stop_rule: Do not reopen selector retuning, delivery, ranking, bitemporal, or promotion-gate work until the query-shape-conditioned candidate-seeding family is either built against directly or explicitly falsified.
note: No single atomic upstream label dominates overwhelmingly, but the top two labels share one bounded upstream seam: the active path fails to open the right query shape early enough to seed answer-bearing temporal/comparison/numeric candidates into the pool.
